channel.title: II CCCB - 22-24th Jul. 2026, Arica, Chile on cccb
channel.description: Recent content in II CCCB - 22-24th Jul. 2026, Arica, Chile on cccb

item.title: II CCCB - 22-24th Jul. 2026, Arica, Chile
item.description: About the II CCCB Date: 22-24 July 2026 Place: Auditorio Facultad de Ciencias, Campus Velasquez (Av. Gral. Velasquez 1775), Universidad de Tarapaca, Arica, Chile. Language: English (preferred) or Spanish. Plenary lectures 30 min + 10 of questions. Invited Talks: 15 min. + 5 min of questions (any topic in Computational Chemistry or Biophysics). Grants available for students. About the location The Campus Velasquez of Universidad de Tarapaca is located close to downtown Arica, near the beach.

item.title: II CCCB - 22-24th Jul. 2026, Arica, Chile
item.description: Conference programme First day, Wed. 22nd Second day, Thur. 23rd Third day, Fri. 24th The registration is free, but stay/food costs (other than coffee breaks) are not included. Grants to fund student’s attendance are provided. Main page Registration About the conference

item.title: II CCCB - 22-24th Jul. 2026, Arica, Chile
item.description: Registration The registration to the II CCCB is free of charge, though but stay/food costs (other than coffee breaks) are not included. Grants are available to fund student’s attendance. Please note that, although this year the plenary lectures have a focus on coarse-grained MD simulations, the regular talks and posters are open to all topics in Computational Chemistry To register, send an email to register@cccb.cl In the email, please include the following information:
